summary: Turkish coffee app admin panel testing complete. Backend: 100% pass (23/23 tests). Frontend: Admin panel fully functional with Turkish UI. All CRUD operations, navigation, and forms working correctly. Customer UI shows proper Turkish translations.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All admin APIs working correctly (login, stats, CRUD operations)
✓ Turkish translations properly implemented in menu items (Klasik Espresso, Karamel Latte, etc.)
✓ Turkish translations in stores (Istanbul locations: Kadıköy, Beşiktaş, Nişantaşı, Bağdat Caddesi)
✓ Turkish translations in rewards (Ücretsiz Espresso Shot, Ücretsiz Atıştırmalık, etc.)
✓ Admin panel navigation between all sections functional
✓ Admin CRUD forms with Turkish labels working (Yeni Ürün Ekle, Yeni Kampanya, etc.)
✓ Customer UI shows Turkish greetings (Günaydın, İyi Öğlenler, İyi Akşamlar)
✓ Customer UI shows Turkish sections (Popüler Ürünler, Kampanyalar, MUTLU SAATLER)
✓ All testID attributes present for admin panel components
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded in all API responses
✓ Bearer token authentication working for admin endpoints
✓ Turkish error messages in API responses (Geçersiz giriş bilgileri, Kullanıcı bulunamadı, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Turkish UI elements present, admin panel fully functional)

seed_data_creation: Created test users via mongosh for points testing. Turkish seed data (menu, stores, rewards) verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Turkish translation complete and verified. Admin panel fully functional with all CRUD operations, navigation, and forms working. Admin credentials: admin@kineticr.com / admin123. All 23 backend admin tests passed. Frontend shows proper Turkish text on welcome, home, menu tabs, and admin dashboard. No issues found.

turkish_data_verification.test_rewards_have_turkish_names: PASS - Turkish rewards found: Ücretsiz Espresso Shot, Ücretsiz Atıştırmalık, Ücretsiz Orta Boy İçecek, Ücretsiz Büyük Boy İçecek, ₺100 İndirim
